DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-30-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Katherine S. Clark, Law Offices, 408-350-7523, for Defendant and moving party

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST DBA ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained without leave to amend. Opposing party failed to provide courtesy copies of the opposition papers as required by San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Order and judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
